configurations.name: myra-app-dev
runtimeArgs: n=$(ls -d "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v2"*/bin 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); [ -n "$n" ] && export PATH="$n:$PATH"; exec bun run dev

configurations.name: myra-app-preview
runtimeArgs: n=$(ls -d "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v2"*/bin 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); [ -n "$n" ] && export PATH="$n:$PATH"; exec bun x next dev -p "${PORT:-1421}"
